message:
feat(widgets): enhance command palette fuzzy scoring algorithm

Improve command palette search relevance with more sophisticated
fuzzy matching and scoring.

scorer.rs enhancements:
- Add word boundary bonus for matches at start of words
- Implement consecutive character bonus for contiguous matches
- Add camelCase/snake_case boundary detection
- Tune scoring weights for better ranking of partial matches
- Handle acronym matching (e.g., "cpe" matches "CommandPaletteExample")

mod.rs integration:
- Wire new scorer into command palette filtering
- Add match highlighting support using score metadata
- Preserve original ordering as tiebreaker for equal scores

These changes make the command palette feel more intuitive by ranking
results that match word boundaries or consecutive characters higher
than scattered character matches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
